summary: EXP-489 contains a targeted single-string prose patch to data/sections.json:part2b.html that replaces the overclaiming "monitoring would expose the contradiction" clause in the SC bucket with a categorically-honest version. Per-WIN categorization in the EXP shows 11/12 of the SC monitoring=none cohort are derivational/structural (WIN-034, 044, 047, 048, 050, 051, 052, 053, 054, 055, 056) and only 1/12 is genuinely empirically monitor-exposable (WIN-061 Schumann). Old string and new string are both verbatim in the EXP for direct sed/replace integration. Other holes in the parent curmudgeon review (filter alignment, build_invariant assertion in build-scripts/generate-html.js) are separate scope; do not bundle.
test_required: After integration, run tests/run.sh; the SC clause is prose-only with no numeric content, so existing build-time arithmetic checks remain unaffected.
